text: The Vikings signed Kyler Murray to a one-year, $1.3 million contract. This is not a quarterback competition; this was a statement by Minnesota.
Michael Penix Jr. was selected in the first round of the 2024 NFL Draft. Penix has not displayed passing competence since entering the league, and I regard Tua as the much better talent.
Trey Benson rushed for 291 yards in 2024, 160 yards in 2025. Many Dynasty managers have been waiting patiently for Benson to take over the backfield, but this looks far from reality now.
